topStories.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

dailyNews.title: U.S. military contractor likely built iPhone hacking tools used by Russian spies in Ukraine
dailyNews.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

dailyNews.title: Erika Kirk replaces late husband Charlie Kirk on US Air Force Academy advisory board after Trump appointment
dailyNews.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

dailyNews.title: ‘Our hearts were shaking’: Tehran residents endure heavy Israel-US bombing
dailyNews.description: The latest attacks come a day after bombing of fuel reserves created thick plumes of smoke that turned day into night.

dailyNews.title: UK sends warship HMS Dragon to Eastern Mediterranean after Cyprus drone attack
dailyNews.description: Britain has deployed the Royal Navy destroyer HMS Dragon to the eastern Mediterranean more than a week after a drone struck its RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus, an attack linked to escalating tensions following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Committed to protecting the Aravalli hills, says  Bhupender Yadav
dailyNews.description: Minister said that the government is considering the setting up of a High Powered Committee on the matter, as directed by the Supreme Court

dailyNews.title: Canadian authorities investigating gunfire at US consulate in Toronto
dailyNews.description: Police report there were no injuries after someone fired a gun at the US consulate in the early morning hours.

dailyNews.title: Canada police investigate after shots fired at US consulate in Toronto
dailyNews.description: It comes as Norwegian police investigate an explosion that occurred outside the US embassy in Oslo on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: IEA due to meet as member states mull releasing oil reserves amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: International Energy Agency chief says talks aim to assess conditions as US-Israel war on Iran fuels global uncertainty.

dailyNews.title: Majority Of Americans Oppose Iran War, 77% Fear Terror Attack On US Soil: Poll
dailyNews.description: The poll has revealed that the majority of the voters do not want to see US Army boots on Iranian soil, but do not see an immediate end to the conflict.

dailyNews.title: US general says he ‘respects’ Iran’s fight
dailyNews.description: The chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff said he “respects” Iran’s resistance in the war.

dailyNews.title: Putin Coughs Repeatedly In Leaked Video, Sparks Speculation About His Heath
dailyNews.description: The Russian president was recording a tribute to women on March 8 when he began coughing and spluttering, forcing him to halt the speech.

dailyNews.title: Iran fires back at Trump over threats to new Supreme Leader: ‘Be careful not to be eliminated’
dailyNews.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

dailyNews.title: Amazon Wins US Court Order Blocking Perplexity's AI Shopping Bots
dailyNews.description: Amazon in November filed a lawsuit against the artificial intelligence startup accusing Perplexity of committing computer fraud by failing to disclose when Comet is shopping on a real person's behalf,...

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran war: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warns Tuesday will be ‘most intense day of strikes’
dailyNews.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday would be the most intense day yet of US strikes inside Iran as the conflict entered its 11th day. Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth vows ‘most intense day’ of US strikes against Iran
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

dailyNews.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
dailyNews.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

dailyNews.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
dailyNews.description: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Is architecture a portrait of society?
dailyNews.description: What does our architecture say about us?

dailyNews.title: From remote work to fuel rationing: How Asian countries are managing energy shortages amid US-Israel-Iran war
dailyNews.description: Asian nations such as Pakistan, Thailand and Vietnam are implementing measures to address economic instability caused by energy supply disruptions amid the Middle East conflict. This includes spending cuts, encouraging remote work and energy conservation efforts.

dailyNews.title: Poll shows majority of Americans oppose attack on Iran, 77% fear terror attack on US soil in retaliation
dailyNews.description: A majority of American voters do not support sending ground troops into Iran, but they also do not expect the conflict to end quickly. While most do not support US attack on Iran, many fear a terror attack on US soil in retaliation

dailyNews.title: Trump foe Fani Willis blocked yet again from collapsed RICO case as president pushes to claw back millions
dailyNews.description: Trump and co-defendants seek $16.8M in legal fees after Georgia DA Fani Willis was disqualified from election case. Judge blocks Willis challenge.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy summer sanctuary limits tourists, hires patrol 'docents' to keep outsiders in check
dailyNews.description: Nantucket's Sconset Bluff Walk faces new visitor restrictions after overtourism complaints. Officials approve recommending limited hours and a patrol system to manage crowds.

dailyNews.title: New Mexico DOJ announces search of former Jeffrey Epstein property Zorro Ranch
dailyNews.description: The New Mexico Department of Justice on Monday announced a search of Zorro Ranch, which was had previously been owned by Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: US consulate in Toronto struck by gunfire, police say; no injuries reported
dailyNews.description: Gunfire struck the U.S. consulate in Toronto early Tuesday, prompting an investigation involving Canadian authorities and U.S. counterparts.

topStories.title: Erika Kirk replaces late husband Charlie Kirk on US Air Force Academy advisory board after Trump appointment
topStories.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

topStories.title: Trump foe Fani Willis blocked yet again from collapsed RICO case as president pushes to claw back millions
topStories.description: Trump and co-defendants seek $16.8M in legal fees after Georgia DA Fani Willis was disqualified from election case. Judge blocks Willis challenge.

topStories.title: Iran regime cited as Trump admin set to designate Sudan’s Muslim Brotherhood a terror group
topStories.description: Trump administration designates Sudanese Muslim Brotherhood as terrorist organization amid Sudan's civil war that has seen thousands of deaths and millions of displacements.

topStories.title: Cuban activist to Trump: ‘Make Cuba great again’ by ending communist rule
topStories.description: Cuban activist Rosa María Payá appeals directly to Trump for support as Cuba faces rolling blackouts and food shortages amid deepening humanitarian crisis.

topStories.title: Trump admin pulls $120K in grants for research on LGBTQ cartoonists, ‘multiethnic’ studies, report says
topStories.description: The Trump administration reportedly pulled $120,000 in NEH grants for LGBTQ comics research and multiethnic studies, sparking controversy over academic freedom.

topStories.title: Jon Jones requests UFC release after Dana White says legend was 'never' considered for White House card
topStories.description: Jon Jones requested his UFC release after CEO Dana White said he would "never" be on the White House card, citing "lowball" contract offers despite comeback preparation.

topStories.title: Trump stirs GOP primary drama with visit to Massie’s Kentucky home turf
topStories.description: President Trump heads to Kentucky as he ramps up his feud with Rep. Thomas Massie, backing a primary challenger after the GOP lawmaker defied him on multiple issues.

topStories.title: Where American support for Trump’s Iran strikes stand as new polls roll in
topStories.description: Most but not all of the latest national polls indicate majority opposition to the U.S. military strikes President Donald Trump ordered against Iran in Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.description: Jon Jones requested his UFC release after CEO Dana White said he would "never" be on the White House card, citing "lowball" contract offers despite comeback preparation.

dailyNews.title: Trump stirs GOP primary drama with visit to Massie’s Kentucky home turf
dailyNews.description: President Trump heads to Kentucky as he ramps up his feud with Rep. Thomas Massie, backing a primary challenger after the GOP lawmaker defied him on multiple issues.

dailyNews.title: Where American support for Trump’s Iran strikes stand as new polls roll in
dailyNews.description: Most but not all of the latest national polls indicate majority opposition to the U.S. military strikes President Donald Trump ordered against Iran in Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Eases Limits on Russian Energy as Oil Prices Soar
dailyNews.description: The volatility in energy markets because of the war in Iran could not come at a better time for President Vladimir V. Putin.

dailyNews.title: Judge Weighs Trump Antisemitism Inquiry Seeking List of Jews From Penn
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has said it is investigating antisemitism. The government sued the University of Pennsylvania after it refused a request to provide information about Jewish faculty and staff.

dailyNews.title: Democrats Sued to Find Out Whether Trump Will Send Armed Officers to Election Sites
dailyNews.description: In a lawsuit filed Tuesday, the D.N.C. sought to compel the government to say whether it plans to deploy armed federal officers in this year’s elections.

dailyNews.title: I Asked a Former Trump Official to Justify This War
dailyNews.description: Nadia Schadlow, a deputy national security adviser during Trump’s first term, explains how the U.S.-Israel war with Iran fits in with an “America first” agenda.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages as markets react to Trump saying it should end "very soon"
dailyNews.description: Markets stem losses as Trump says Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: U.S.-Israel war with Iran intensifying on Day 11: What to know
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Monday that the war with Iran will end "very soon," but on the 11th day of fighting strikes are still intensifying. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata, Nancy Cordes and Edward Smith have more.

dailyNews.title: Thune stands firm on SAVE America Act despite Trump pressure
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune made clear that an elections bill known as the SAVE America Act faces an unlikely path to passage.

dailyNews.title: Trump order cutting ties with Anthropic likely coming this week, sources say
dailyNews.description: President Trump will issue an executive order to remove Anthropic's AI technology from agencies across the executive branch, sources familiar with the matter tell CBS News.

dailyNews.title: White House gives mixed messages on war with Iran as strikes intensify
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Monday the war against Iran will be over "very soon," while Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday would be the most intense day of strikes on Iran so far. When asked about timing, Hegseth said, "It's not for me to posit whether it's the beginning, the middle or the end." CBS News' Eleanor Watson and Aaron Navarro have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he "knew oil prices would go up" but it's been less than he anticipated
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he "knew oil prices would go up," but it's been less than he anticipated after oil prices hit more than $100 per barrel on Monday. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady has more.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth indicates Trump will decide when Iran war is complete
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine, chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, held a briefing to reinforce U.S. military objectives heading into the 11th day of the war against Iran. NBC News’ Sahil Kapur reports on Hegseth outlining when the U.S. could end the war and how it expects Iran to operate in the aftermath.

dailyNews.title: Why Vladimir Putin may be the big winner from Trump's Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Vladimir Putin may have lost an ally, but the Iran war could prove a boon for Russia, whose economy is dependent on energy exports.
